title: The Standard Advice for Prediabetes Is Wrong About What Actually Matters
description: About 96 million Americans have been told the same thing: lose 5–7% of your body weight, or your prediabetes will become diabetes. New research published in 2026 shows blood sugar can fully normalize without hitting that threshold — and the reason why upends three decades of clinical thinking. The real target isn't your scale. It's the fat hiding in your liver.
category: Nutrition — deliberately chosen to address the most underrepresented substantive category in the collection (2 of 45 articles). The ADHD candidate scored comparably on raw merit but Neuroscience already represents 38% of the collection. Collection integrity requires this override.
